{% if docs_top_tabs is defined and docs_top_tabs %} {% set current_lang = "zh" if pagename.startswith("zh/") else "en" %}
{% for tab in docs_top_tabs %} {% set supported_languages = tab.get("languages", ["en", "zh"]) %} {% if current_lang in supported_languages %} {% set label = tab.get("label_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("label_zh") else tab.get("label_en") %} {% set href = tab.get("href_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("href_zh") else tab.get("href_en") %} {% if href %} {{ label }} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
